inputs.name: SK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte secret seed for generating WOTS+ and FORS private keys

inputs.name: SK.prf
inputs.description: n-byte secret PRF key for generating message randomizers

inputs.name: PK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte public seed for domain separation

outputs.name: SK
outputs.description: 4n-byte SLH-DSA private key: (SK.seed, SK.prf, PK.seed, PK.root)
